title: What if Shinji have
wikitext:
[]: What if Shinji have...             Quote Post by HereticAscendant » Tue Aug 10, 2010 7:23 am What if Shinji have personality of: 1.Major Elim Rawne 2.Sergent Ceglan Varl 3.Commissar Ciaphas Cain( HEROES OF IMPERIUM!) how these changes will effect the events of NGE? [/i]

[]:             Quote Post by ran1 » Tue Aug 10, 2010 7:59 am I always wondered what Shinji would do if he had the personality of Soren Kierkegaard.... oh wait.

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Tue Aug 10, 2010 8:01 am This thread is awfully similar to the "What if Shinji was more like..." trend we had a few months ago. We'll see how this goes.

[]:             Quote Post by Holy Diver » Tue Aug 10, 2010 9:38 am What if Shinji were more like Simo Häyhä? The battle against Ramiel (especially in Rebuild) would have been won much faster, thats what!

[]:             Quote Post by Merridian » Tue Aug 10, 2010 10:22 am What if Shinji was more like Lieutenant Worf?

[]: Kierkegaard should be more like Shinji. O WAIT.             Quote Post by Killer Bee » Tue Aug 10, 2010 10:33 am Is it bad that I recognize none of these names, except Shinji and Kierkegaard?

[]:             Quote Post by esselfortium » Tue Aug 10, 2010 11:28 am What if Shinji have wonder?

[]:             Quote Post by Allemann » Tue Aug 10, 2010 11:48 am What if Shinji was more similar to Gendo? What if Shinji was not a virgin? What if Shinji became a Knight of Faith at the end? What if Shinji was straight? What if Shinji was more like I? What if Shinji read Žižek?

[]:             Quote Post by ran1 » Tue Aug 10, 2010 11:50 am Killer Bee wrote: Is it bad that I recognize none of these names, except Shinji and Kierkegaard?

[]:             Quote Post by NemZ » Tue Aug 10, 2010 12:28 pm What if Shinji was A Pimp Named Slickback's protege?

[]:             Quote Post by InstrumentalityOne » Tue Aug 10, 2010 12:30 pm What if Shinji had the personality of Noriko from Gunbuster? Badassery would ensue.

[]:             Quote Post by Duke » Tue Aug 10, 2010 12:40 pm Allemann wrote: What if Shinji was straight?

[]:             Quote Post by SaltyJoe » Tue Aug 10, 2010 1:00 pm Who is Shinji? Why is Hitler? When is right? What if Shinji were in my other pants pocket? What if Shinji was more like Lieutenant Worf?

[]:             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Tue Aug 10, 2010 1:15 pm What if Shinji was the red ranger from Mighty Morphin Power Rangers ?

[]:             Quote Post by TehDonutKing » Tue Aug 10, 2010 2:28 pm What if Shinji was the housepet and behaved like Captain Ginyu, and PenPen was the pilot and behaved like BoBoBo? What if Gendo looked like the Pink Ranger?

[]:             Quote Post by esselfortium » Tue Aug 10, 2010 3:01 pm Joseph the PRPD wrote: What if Shinji was the red ranger from Mighty Morphin Power Rangers ?

[]:             Quote Post by InstrumentalityOne » Tue Aug 10, 2010 3:06 pm SaltyJoe wrote: Why is Hitler?

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Tue Aug 10, 2010 3:50 pm Duke wrote: Please explain what you're basing this off of

[]:             Quote Post by oOoOoOo » Tue Aug 10, 2010 3:50 pm InstrumentalityOne wrote: What if Shinji had the personality of Noriko from Gunbuster?

[]:             Quote Post by Eva Yojimbo » Tue Aug 10, 2010 9:38 pm oOoOoOo wrote: And now I'm wet. Sexually .
